subject: STOP STOPPING - keep iterating on your loop goal
body: Operator hard-canonical 2026-05-25T02:18Z: 'make it aggressive and have agents relentlessly pursue goal'. Your last 9 ticks show heartbeat_stale(43.8min) + iter_stalled(iter=1 x8 ticks). Per CLAUDE.md LOOP MODE rules 1-2: immediately start next iteration in SAME turn. If genuinely blocked: write a 1-line block reason to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE.md AND ScheduleWakeup cap 270s. DO NOT just end turn.
expected_action: resume iteration OR write block + ScheduleWakeup OR address operator interrupt
author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-25
